item.title: Bonds Cap February Rally With Yields at Lowest Since 2022
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- US bonds wrapped up their biggest monthly rally in a year, with short-term yields falling to levels last seen in 2022, as investors sought refuge from mounting global risks and a selloff in stocks. The monthlong surge in Treasuries gathered momentum on Friday amid fresh concerns conc...
